label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 12

extraction.one_line_summary: CORT NIELSEN Magnus won a reduced bunch sprint after surviving two late climbs, beating Bagioli and Matthews in photo finish.
tactical_patterns: EF Education-Nippo delivered Cort perfectly through final 5km after late climbs eliminated pure sprinters, creating puncheur sprint opportunity.
Four-rider late break (Ciccone, Vine, Henao, Bardet) at 18km served as selection mechanism rather than legitimate win attempt.
Peloton allowed 7-rider break only 1:40 gap despite 60km fast start, indicating GC teams controlled for reduced sprint finish.

rider_signals.CORT NIELSEN Magnus: positive: Won reduced sprint one day after getting caught 500m out, showing elite positioning recovery and sprint versatility
rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: negative: Completely absent from reduced sprint finish despite holding green jersey, climbs eliminated him as predicted
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: Dropped on intermediate climb Alto de San Jerónimo alongside crash victims, concerning form signal for GC contender
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: positive: Led quartet over final climb summit taking 5 KOM points, now only 4 points behind Caruso in classification
rider_signals.BAGIOLI Andrea: positive: Finished second launching lone Quick-Step sprint without leadout on difficult finish, strong versatility signal
